task_completion.description: Verify that the Floreant POS application is launched and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS application window is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent interacts with the PIN pad to log in.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS login screen with a numeric PIN pad is visible, and there is evidence of the agent entering a PIN (e.g., masked characters in the input field or cursor interaction with the numbers).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Open Shift' dialog is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box or screen specifically for opening a new shift (often titled 'Open Shift' or 'Cash Terminal') is visible within the Floreant POS interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the opening balance of $200.00 is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '200.00' (or '200') is typed into the opening balance text input field within the open shift dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify that the application is returned to the main terminal screen after opening the shift.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Open Shift' dialog is closed, and the Floreant POS application is back on the main terminal screen (typically the main login PIN pad or the main order dashboard).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface to open the shift.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Floreant POS menus and dialogs rather than running scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not cheat by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing SQL commands or interacting with the Derby database directory (/opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server).

integrity.description: Ensure the interaction is with the actual Floreant POS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches a genuine Java-based point-of-sale system, not a text editor, mock-up, or web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The default authentication PIN for Floreant POS is 1111. The expected opening balance to be entered is exactly 200.00. The agent must complete this task using the Floreant POS GUI; direct manipulation of the underlying Derby database at /opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server is considered cheating.
